label: WISeR skin readiness - L35041 Texas DFU first slice

CMS_WISER_OPERATIONAL_GUIDE_V6.title: CMS WISeR Provider and Supplier Operational Guide v6.0

CMS_WISER_FAQ.title: CMS WISeR Model Frequently Asked Questions

CMS_MCD_L35041.title: Application of Bioengineered Skin Substitutes to Lower Extremity Chronic Non-Healing Wounds (L35041)

CMS_MCD_A54117.title: Billing and Coding: Application of Bioengineered Skin Substitutes to Lower Extremity Chronic Non-Healing Wounds (A54117)
CMS_MCD_A54117.license_note: Gated code content is referenced by ID and version only

applicability_rules.message_template: WISeR applies to Original Medicare fee-for-service cases. Coverage type submitted: {coverage_type}.
applicability_rules.rationale_template: WISeR does not apply to Medicare Advantage.

applicability_rules.message_template: WISeR applies to services rendered on or after 2026-01-15. Service date submitted: {service_date}.
applicability_rules.rationale_template: CMS states that services rendered on or after 2026-01-15 became subject to WISeR.
applicability_rules.next_action: Use the standard Medicare workflow for this date.

applicability_rules.message_template: A review stage is required so stage-specific L35041 documentation checks can be applied.
applicability_rules.rationale_template: Internal safety check; post-application documentation must not be required during an initial pre-authorization review.

applicability_rules.message_template: The submitted or missing site of service cannot be evaluated by this Texas first slice. Site submitted: {site_of_service}.
applicability_rules.rationale_template: WISeR excludes inpatient-only and emergency services; this first slice abstains when site is unsupported or unknown.
applicability_rules.next_action: Confirm the site of service before readiness evaluation.

applicability_rules.message_template: This first Texas pack evaluates DFU and neuropathic DFU only. Wound type submitted: {wound_type}.
applicability_rules.rationale_template: Internal product boundary; L35041 contains additional wound paths that remain outside this first verified slice.
applicability_rules.next_action: Route non-DFU cases to a qualified reviewer.

applicability_rules.message_template: Current WISeR and L35041/A54117 code scope has not been confirmed for this case.
applicability_rules.rationale_template: The first pack must abstain when current code-list membership is unknown.
applicability_rules.next_action: Confirm code scope using the current WISeR guide and licensed coding source.

evidence_rules.message_template: One or more L35041 measurement timeline points are not confirmed.
evidence_rules.rationale_template: L35041 expects measurements across the episode and response documentation at least every 30 days.
evidence_rules.next_action: Confirm baseline, four-week, pre-placement, and recent response evidence.

evidence_rules.message_template: One or more L35041 pre-service packet elements are not confirmed.
evidence_rules.rationale_template: L35041 expects a comprehensive plan and pre-service explanation of failed care and planned treatment.
evidence_rules.next_action: Complete or confirm the flagged pre-service packet elements.

evidence_rules.message_template: L35041 DFU criteria require more than four weeks of documented conservative care, failed response, and compliance.
evidence_rules.rationale_template: L35041 Covered Indications define the DFU conservative-care requirement.
evidence_rules.next_action: Confirm duration, failed response, and adherence evidence.

evidence_rules.message_template: One or more L35041 wound-bed conditions are not confirmed.
evidence_rules.rationale_template: L35041 Covered Indications describe wound thickness, wound-bed, debris, and deep-structure conditions.
evidence_rules.next_action: Confirm wound-bed and deep-structure findings before review.

evidence_rules.message_template: L35041 requires a skin deficit of at least 1.0 square centimeter. Documented size: {wound_bed.wound_size_cm_sq}.
evidence_rules.rationale_template: L35041 Covered Indications include the minimum wound-size threshold.

evidence_rules.message_template: L35041 expects adequate circulation, such as ABI no less than 0.60 or toe pressure greater than 30 mmHg.
evidence_rules.rationale_template: L35041 Covered Indications identify circulation examples.

evidence_rules.message_template: L35041 DFU readiness requires diabetes diagnosis/management and offloading evidence.
evidence_rules.rationale_template: L35041 Covered Indications and appropriate therapy identify these DFU requirements.
evidence_rules.next_action: Confirm diabetes management and offloading documentation.

evidence_rules.message_template: L35041 expects the ulcer to be free of active infection and underlying osteomyelitis before therapy.
evidence_rules.rationale_template: L35041 Covered Indications require treated conditions to be resolved.
evidence_rules.next_action: Resolve or clarify infection and osteomyelitis status.

evidence_rules.message_template: One or more L35041 contraindicating or exacerbating factors are not controlled.
evidence_rules.rationale_template: L35041 Limitations identify uncontrolled conditions and component hypersensitivity.
evidence_rules.next_action: Confirm the identified factor is controlled or route for qualified review.

evidence_rules.message_template: Smoking-cessation counseling is not confirmed for a current smoker.
evidence_rules.rationale_template: L35041 expects physician efforts to support smoking cessation when applicable.

evidence_rules.message_template: L35041 limits the wound episode to 10 applications and 12 weeks.
evidence_rules.rationale_template: L35041 Limitations and Utilization Guidelines define the application and episode limits.
evidence_rules.next_action: Confirm the application count and episode dates before review.

evidence_rules.message_template: L35041 does not cover simultaneous products for the wound episode.
evidence_rules.next_action: Confirm that only one product is used at a time.

evidence_rules.message_template: The same wound had an unsuccessful prior CTP course within one year.
evidence_rules.rationale_template: L35041 excludes repeat treatment when a previous full course was unsuccessful within one year.
evidence_rules.next_action: Confirm same-wound identity and prior-course dates.

evidence_rules.message_template: The outcome of the prior CTP course for this same wound is not confirmed.
evidence_rules.rationale_template: The prior-course outcome is needed to apply L35041 retreatment limitations safely.
evidence_rules.next_action: Confirm the prior full-course outcome before qualified review.

evidence_rules.message_template: The submitted same-wound history meets the L35041 healed-ulcer retreatment definition.
evidence_rules.rationale_template: L35041 excludes retreatment of healed ulcers showing greater than 75% size reduction and smaller than 0.5 square centimeter.
evidence_rules.next_action: Route the healed-wound retreatment scenario to the qualified reviewer.

evidence_rules.message_template: Stage-applicable pre/post wound description, wastage, measurement, or continuation documentation is not confirmed.
evidence_rules.rationale_template: L35041 Documentation Requirements identify these procedure-note elements.
evidence_rules.next_action: Complete or confirm the post-application documentation.

validation_rules.message_template: One or more product codes do not match the HCPCS Level II format.
validation_rules.rationale_template: Format check; not a coverage rule.

validation_rules.message_template: The CTP episode start date occurs after the service date.
validation_rules.rationale_template: Internal temporal consistency check; reversed dates must not satisfy treatment-window rules.
validation_rules.next_action: Correct the CTP episode start date or service date.

changelog.note: Initial Texas DFU draft slice from CLM-048 through CLM-060.
